documentation.description:
Image I/O: output in PPM, BMP, PNG, and QOI formats; input in BMP, GIF, JPG, PNG, PNM, QOI, and TGA formats

tagged_types.name: Handle
tagged_types.code: type Handle is tagged limited private;

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: procedure Create (Holder : in out Handle; Width : in Positive; Height : in Positive)

documentation.description:
Makes Holder hold an image Width x Height, default initialized
Any image in Holder is discarded

subprograms.name: Is_Empty
subprograms.code: function Is_Empty (Holder : in Handle) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if Create has not been called on Holder; False otherwise

subprograms.name: Update
subprograms.code: procedure Update (Holder : in Handle; Process : access procedure (Image : in out Image_Data) )

documentation.description: Calls Process with the image in Holder

subprograms.name: Value
subprograms.code: function Value (Holder : in Handle) return Image_Data

documentation.description: Returns the image held by Holder
